name: Heat and Run
short_description: Heat and Run is a multiplayer shooter: Play Heroes with unique skills, master the creation of Blocks in intense battles, and work with your allies to destroy the opposing Flame!
detailed_description:
Join our discord


EARLY ACCESS ROADMAP


About the Game

FIGHT WITH BLOCKS CREATION

You have two weapons to eliminate your opponents: the Glocktail fires instantly, and the Dynameat explodes Blocks and propels players. Blocks are your best assets for securing victory; they allow you to move, protect yourself, and defend the Flame at all costs!

POWERFUL AND CURSED HEROES

Discover 12 Heroes with multiple skills, both passive and active, each as impactful as the others. After selecting your Hero, you complete your arsenal with a magical Relic that boosts your weapons or skills!

EASY TO LEARN, HARD TO MASTER

Defending your Flame and destroying the opposing team's Flame may seem simple! However, you'll need to master all aspects of the game to organize your defense effectively and coordinate your attacks during intense battles. There are numerous tricks with Blocks; will you discover them all?

FAST-PACED & TEAM BASED

Dominate the game with your team by creating effective strategies and adapting to all possible situations. Communicate with your allies using voice commands and ping location.

OTHER FEATURES

Have none of your friends want to play with you anymore because you're too good? Heat and Run includes bots so you can play or practice anytime. Climb the rankings, play privately with the custom mode, and create your own competitive team!


Discover our roadmap at the top of the Steam page and share your feedback and encountered bugs with us on our Discord.
